name: title_card
description: Game title card artwork reading exactly "Test Game" — chunky arched premium display lettering in warm gold and cream with a teal ribbon banner behind, crowned by a radiant gold star with small sparkles. The words "Test Game" are the requested text.
prompt_extra: gently arched baseline; thick friendly letterforms with darker-gold outline and glossy bevel; composition sized for a wide home-screen banner

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, richer gold tones and a touch more ornament

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly cooler, simpler and more minimal composition
